item.title: Öl über 100 Dollar: Das ist die richtige Strategie für Anleger
item.author: FOCUS online
item.description: Die Hoffnung ist verschwunden, dass der Iran-Krieg schnell endet. Stattdessen werden die schlimmsten Befürchtungen war: Die Straße von Hormus ist unpassierbar, der Ölpreis schießt in die Höhe. Mittlerweile hat er sogar die Marke von 100 Dollar je Barrel passiert. An den Börsen herrscht zunehmend Pan...

item.title: EQS-PVR: TAG Immobilien AG: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG [the German Securities Trading Act] with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
item.author: FN FinanzNachrichten.de
item.description: EQS Voting Rights Announcement: TAG Immobilien AG TAG Immobilien AG: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG [the German Securities Trading Act] with the objective of Europe-wide distribution 09.03.2026 / 09:44 CET/CESTDissemination of a Voting Rights Announcement transmitted by EQS N...

item.title: Yorkshire Water receives fresh funding despite sewage fines and pay row
item.author: theguardian.com
item.description:
A leading European investor will pump fresh funding into Yorkshire Water including helping to cover a £600m loan, despite recent heavy sewage fines and a scandal over executive pay at the utility firm.
EQT, a Swedish private equity group, said on Monday it would take a 42% stake in Kelda Holdings, ...

A leading European investor will pump fresh funding into Yorkshire Water including helping to cover a £600m loan, despite recent heavy sewage fines and a scandal over executive pay at the utility firm.
